config_error.title: Desktop configuration error
config_error.description: Multica Desktop could not load <1>~/.multica/desktop.json</1>. Fix or remove the file and restart the app.
config_error.description_suffix: . Fix or remove the file and restart the app.

daemon.title: Daemon
daemon.description: Configure how the local agent daemon behaves with the desktop app.

auto_start.label: Auto-start on launch
auto_start.description: Automatically start the daemon when the app opens and you are logged in.

auto_stop.label: Auto-stop on quit
auto_stop.description: Stop the daemon when the desktop app is closed. Disable this to keep the daemon running in the background.

cli_status.title: CLI Status
cli_status.installed: multica CLI is installed and available in PATH.
cli_status.missing: multica CLI not found. Install it to enable daemon management.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Identification and connection details. Useful when filing a bug report or investigating why a runtime isn't showing up.

state_description.running_empty: Running, but no runtimes have registered yet.
state_description.running_one: Running here · 1 runtime available for tasks.
state_description.running_other: Running here · {{count}} runtimes available for tasks.
state_description.stopped: Not running · this device can't take new tasks.
state_description.installing_cli: Setting up the runtime for the first time. Only happens once.
state_description.cli_not_found: Setup failed · couldn't download the runtime. Check your network.

card.title: Local daemon
card.toast_restarting_description: Runtimes will be back online in a few seconds.

stop_confirm.description_one: {{count}} task is currently running on this device. Stopping now will interrupt it — affected tasks get marked <1>failed</1> once the timeout hits. The daemon won't auto-restart.
stop_confirm.description_other: {{count}} tasks are currently running on this device. Stopping now will interrupt them — affected tasks get marked <1>failed</1> once the timeout hits. The daemon won't auto-restart.
stop_confirm.description_prefix_one: {{count}} task is currently running on this device. Stopping now will interrupt it — affected tasks get marked
stop_confirm.description_prefix_other: {{count}} tasks are currently running on this device. Stopping now will interrupt them — affected tasks get marked
stop_confirm.description_suffix: once the timeout hits. The daemon won't auto-restart.

logs.title: Local daemon logs
logs.empty_filtered_hint: Try a different search or level toggle.
logs.empty_not_running_hint: Start the daemon to see logs here.
logs.empty_running_hint: New entries will appear in real time.
logs.empty_stopped: Start the daemon to stream logs.

settings.title: Updates
settings.description: The desktop app checks for new versions automatically once an hour and shortly after launch.
settings.check_description: Trigger a check now instead of waiting for the next automatic poll. Available updates appear as a notification in the corner.
settings.available: v{{version}} is available — see the download prompt in the corner.
